threats: Chain-CC risk (1 hard-CC abilities, ~0.5s of lockdown): Kwang Surge of the Heavens (knockup 0.5s). Don't group tight into it — stagger the engage and hold mobility/cleanse for the key one.
Enemy is 4/5 physical — a single armor item blunts most of their damage; itemize armor on anyone diveable.
synergy: Your engage/CC: Bayle Kingslayer (knockback). Your kills come from landing burst INSIDE that CC window — whoever lands it, the rest must follow up immediately.
Strong AoE/teamfight kit — group at choke points and fight on top of objectives.

ourKits.combo: Skull Crusher gap-close → Dire Howl slow → Cursed Edge → Kingslayer knockback dash, Berserk at low HP
ourKits.winCondition: engage, drop low into Berserk and out-brawl
ourKits.playWith: follow-up while he commits the dive
ourKits.playAgainst: his Berserk rewards low HP — burst him fully or disengage; anti-heal helps

ourKits.combo: Stasis Bomb stun → Photon Disruptor slow → Containment Fence wall → Ion Strike slow ult
ourKits.winCondition: lock a target with stun + fence and let the team collapse
ourKits.passive: Rocket Boots mobility, refreshed by abilities
ourKits.playWith: burst that converts her stun/fence into a kill
ourKits.playAgainst: dodge Stasis Bomb; the fence zones — flank around it

ourKits.combo: Windsurge engage → Cyclebreaker damage-reduction spin → clones from 84000 Hairs
ourKits.winCondition: stance-dance for damage or tankiness and overwhelm with clones
ourKits.playWith: a team that fights alongside his clones
ourKits.playAgainst: AoE clears his clones; CC him during the damage-reduction window

ourKits.combo: Boreal Sweep slow → Hoarfrost root → Glacial Charge engage → Cryoseism stun ult
ourKits.winCondition: chain frost CC (slow→root→stun) to lock the fight down
ourKits.playWith: burst that converts her long CC chain into kills
ourKits.playAgainst: she's a CC battery — cleanse/QSS the Cryoseism stun; spread to avoid the chain

ourKits.combo: Bramble Patch slow → Harvest Nettles stacks → Untamed Growth DoT → Fly Trap pull ult
ourKits.winCondition: Fly Trap a clumped team and detonate AoE on the pull
ourKits.passive: takedowns spawn growths + grant move speed
ourKits.playWith: engage that clumps for her Fly Trap
ourKits.playAgainst: spread out vs the pull; she's squishy — dive her

enemyKits.combo: Judgement tether → Surge knockup → Fury of the Heavens slow, recall the blade
enemyKits.winCondition: tether a target, knock up and brawl with energized basics
enemyKits.playWith: follow-up while he tethers and knocks up
enemyKits.playAgainst: bait his blade-recall mobility, then punish when it's placed

enemyKits.combo: Pounce → Rumble slow → Boulder Throw → Behemoth ult to brawl
enemyKits.winCondition: engage with Pounce, grow with Behemoth and out-sustain the fight
enemyKits.passive: ramping health regen for jungle sustain
enemyKits.playWith: follow-up damage while he front-lines and CCs
enemyKits.playAgainst: anti-heal and kiting beat his sustain brawl; burst him before Behemoth

enemyKits.combo: stance-swap with Zero Shift → Tachyon Lance (ranged) or melee chain → Limit Break on Overheat
enemyKits.winCondition: build Heat and burst with Limit Break, flexing range and melee
enemyKits.passive: damage builds Heat → Overheat unlocks Limit Break
enemyKits.playWith: peel that lets her ramp Heat safely
enemyKits.playAgainst: pressure her before Overheat; CC during the melee stance

enemyKits.combo: Vortex Grenade → Vaporize pierce → Rocket Dash reposition → Ventilate ult
enemyKits.winCondition: reposition with Rocket Dash and unload Ventilate from safety
enemyKits.passive: abilities grant AS + a triple-shot next basic
enemyKits.playWith: a frontline to create his free-fire window
enemyKits.playAgainst: he's mobile but squishy — CC through the dash, then burst

enemyKits.combo: Assault The Gates leap → Make Way armor shred → Sacred Oath empowered basic → Stone Forged Soul stasis ult
enemyKits.winCondition: front-line aggressively and reset the fight with the stasis heal
enemyKits.playWith: a team that fights while he soaks and stasis-resets
enemyKits.playAgainst: don't waste burst into his stasis — wait it out; anti-heal cuts the ult heal
